name: small deserted Office
description: I'm in a small deserted Office
hints: Madame Web's office! She is a key NPC - this is also the TREASURE ROOM (room 37).
DROP all gems here for points. Madame Web may give cryptic guidance. SOUTH returns to the hall.
TREASURE ROOM - DROP all *Gem* and *Bio Gem* items here for score. Madame Web is an ally. SOUTH→room 35 (hall).
notes: TREASURE ROOM (room 37). Drop all gems here. Madame Web is present as ally/oracle. SOUTH→room 35 (hall).
